title: ESSENCE AND CONCEPT OF "CRIMINAL PROCEDURE LAW"
author: Bozorov Maqsudali Mahmudovich
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The purpose of this article is not to reveal the essence of criminal procedural law as a whole as an independent phenomenon of legal reality, but to reveal the essence of the concept of "criminal procedural law", options for its interpretation and presentation of one's vision in the definition of this term.
steps_raw: The purpose of this article is not to reveal the essence of criminal procedural law as a whole as an independent phenomenon of legal reality, but to reveal the essence of the concept of "criminal procedural law", options for its interpretation and presentation of one's vision in the definition of this term.
